question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL with a query string (e.g., 'http://host/?foo=bar'), causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to construct a URL like 'http://host/?foo=bar/api/v1/network/nodes', which is malformed and causes the HTTP request to fail, griefing the pinger startup?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK to 'other' and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a URL with a trailing slash (e.g., 'http://host/'), causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to construct 'http://host//api/v1/network/nodes' (double slash), potentially causing a 404 on strict servers and griefing the pinger startup?
